name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> No concrete evidence shows the Iris dataset is actually used. In `src/data_loader.py`, `load_dataset()` only returns a placeholder dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not import or load Iris data. The trajectory note also explicitly says there is insufficient evidence to confirm Iris usage.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual data standardization. The file only contains placeholder logic: `load_dataset()` returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and `build_transforms()` returns a list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, but there is no real preprocessing code (e.g., scaler import, fit/transform, or feature value normalization applied to dataset columns). The requirement is mentioned only as text in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, not executed in code.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only lists the requirement text in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and returns placeholder data in `load_dataset()`. There is no actual feature selection logic, no computation of feature importance, and no use of any selection method or reduced feature set in the code.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement an SVM classifier. The file only defines metadata like `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`/`KEYWORDS` and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"` (or a ResNet-18 string in another condition). There is no SVM class, no import such as `sklearn.svm`, and no model construction logic for an SVM.

<UNSATISFIED> The file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` exists, but its actual content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is a placeholder tuple rather than a saved classification accuracy value. This does not demonstrate that classification accuracy was properly stored in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> Although `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists in the workspace tree, the provided file content shows an image-read failure: `"The image data you provided does not represent a valid image"`. This means there is insufficient evidence that a valid confusion matrix image was successfully generated and saved as the required PNG.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/app.py` is not a Streamlit web app implementation. The file only defines constants and a `main()` function returning a dictionary, with no `import streamlit`, no UI elements, and no code to display classification results or model performance. Although `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists, there is no evidence in `src/app.py` that it showcases that image or saves figures to `results/figures/`.
